title: If you could be any Eva character who would you be
display_title: If you could be any Eva character who would you be
wikitext:
[]: If you could be any Eva character who would you be?             Quote Post by Unit01Eva » Fri Aug 21, 2009 7:35 pm If you could be any Eva character who would you be? This thread is based around a Eva character you would want to be for one day. It can't be a angel or Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Aug 21, 2009 7:40 pm I'd have to pick Rei.

[]: Re: If you could be any Eva character who would you be?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Aug 21, 2009 7:49 pm I'm not one to fantasize about being a fictional character, but if I had to pick, I'd probably go with Kaji. He's a secret agent, which is cool, and in my opinion, he's the wisest, most mature, most well-adjusted character in the show. Unit01Eva wrote: It can't be a angel or Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Aug 21, 2009 7:53 pm Hm.... Tough call. I'd have to say... None of them. They all die in a horrible way! The FAR.

[]:             Quote Post by Rabid-Sachiel » Fri Aug 21, 2009 7:55 pm I would be Shinji. It would be awesome to pilot Eva-01 in bad ass angel fights and such.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Aug 21, 2009 8:14 pm Hikari. Even if shes a girl shes still the most normal and sane one in the whole bunch either her or Kensuke or Toji. Anyone tied to NERV is effed from the get go.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinji-kun » Fri Aug 21, 2009 8:20 pm Could we maybe extend it to what anime character you'd be? Anyway i'd be kaworu. He had so little screen time yet he was so amazing. Kaworu will always have a lasting impact on me.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Aug 21, 2009 9:08 pm Kaji of course. Haz hot sex with Misato, has awesome shaggy (lol shave what is that) looks, is secret agent , has gun, is totally cool and awesome AND to top it all of is least screwed up of our characters (albeit reasonably enough he is)

[]:             Quote Post by sean_sean_sean_sean » Fri Aug 21, 2009 9:14 pm When Ritsuko is nude and being ogled by those SEELE monoliths... I assume one of them is directly... behind her? If so, I want to be that guy

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Aug 21, 2009 9:17 pm You know its not really them. I hate to break your dream, seeings as how I'm HAWT for Rits-chan too - but they're just holograms like in star wars; Idono if they can even see Gendo/Ritsuko when they talk to them.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Fri Aug 21, 2009 9:25 pm Gendo ...DUH. I tell my son not to be a bitch, screw chicks just to be a dick, and having my wife's soul in a giant robot. What more could want out of life??

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Aug 21, 2009 9:39 pm Math Puppy, obviously.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Fri Aug 21, 2009 10:21 pm how odd it may sound, i would want to be Shinji, i hate that little prick but i would get to kiss Asuka... EDIT: that's how much i love her, i would want to be Shinji out of free will just so i could kiss Asuka once and be with her a whole day...

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Fri Aug 21, 2009 10:33 pm Kaji. Everyone loves the Kaji san.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Fri Aug 21, 2009 10:42 pm EDIT: If I could be someone in Eva, Id be the guy behind the glass screen staring at all the shit going on. said guy is on a couch, on a saturday morning. yeah....

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Fri Aug 21, 2009 11:20 pm i_Love_Asuka wrote: how odd it may sound, i would want to be Shinji, i hate that little prick but i would get to kiss Asuka... EDIT: that's how much i love her, i would want to be Shinji out of free will just so i could kiss Asuka once and be with her a whole day...

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Aug 21, 2009 11:43 pm I pick my Shin-chan!!!!! Because he gets to pilot a giant robot, gets to live with a cute and hot girl and a sexy older woman who likes to drink and seems to be surrounded by attractive females. I mean if I was Shinji I wouldve given up on Dad after he dumped me or at leas after my first few times piloting. Hell..... I would've handled everything differently..... but then I guess I wouldn't be Shinji then would I?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Aug 22, 2009 12:17 am schismatics wrote: Gendo ...DUH. I tell my son not to be a bitch, screw chicks just to be a dick

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Sat Aug 22, 2009 12:20 am I would not ever trade my life with anyone in Eva. I've suffered enough of my own depression as it is and don't feel the need to take on anyone else's, much less try to prevent the end of the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Sat Aug 22, 2009 12:30 am EMK, I'd hitch a train and try to make my way in this world as an albino. But to be someone in the evaverse, I'd be shinface just cause I could to it better. But that's what they all say.
